+[  Authentication  ]-----------------+   +[  Processing  ]--------------------+
|                                     |   |                                    |
| +---------+        +------------+   |   |  +---------+        +-----------+  |
| |  Login  +------->|  Validate  +--------->|  Parse  +------->|  Execute  |  |
| +---------+        +------------+   |   |  +---------+        +-----------+  |
|                                     |   |                                    |
|                                     |   |                                    |
|                                     |   |                                    |
+-------------------------------------+   +------------------------------------+
